runtime_contracts: Runtime-core lifecycle contracts, including payload retention/release and EOF ordering, live in spec/core_vectors.json.
Concurrency, socket tuning, fairness, and benchmark surfaces remain Go runtime tests because they are implementation contracts rather than language-neutral reducer vectors.
New protocol behavior should add reduce/helper/pool/config vectors before changing production code.
